titlestmt.titleproper: Yale School of Art Master of Fine Arts in Painting/Printmaking and Sculpture Thesis Documentation Collection
Yale School of Art Master of Fine Arts in Painting/Printmaking and Sculpture Thesis Documentation Collection
titlestmt.author: Finding aid by Kathy Winsor Bohlman and Maria Zapata

publicationstmt.publisher: Robert B. Haas Family Arts Library Special Collections

maintenanceagency.agencyname: Robert B. Haas Family Arts Library Special Collections

descriptivenote.p: Finding aid description and metadata in Archives at Yale are licensed under a CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. This means that anyone may copy, modify, and distribute this descriptive metadata without restriction or permission. The CC0 license is explained in full on the Creative Commons website: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. More information is available on our Help page.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Monday June 9, 2025 at 19:00

did.unittitle: Yale School of Art Master of Fine Arts in Painting/Printmaking and Sculpture thesis documentation collection

corpname.part: Robert B. Haas Family Arts Library Special Collections

did.physdesc: Significant amount of born digital material.

scopecontent.head: Content Description
scopecontent.p: The collection includes thesis documentation submitted as part of the School of Art's MFA degree requirements. These are not full theses and do not include the works of art themselves. The files often, but not always, contain images of works, inventories, artist's CV,and artist's statement.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Thesis documentation is arranged in series by year of graduation and then alphabetically by name of graduate.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The collection is open for research.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Copyright is retained by the creator(s) of this collection for materials they have authored or otherwise produced. Reproduction is restricted and requires written consent of the creator(s). Researchers are solely responsible for locating creators and requesting reproduction.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: Transferred from the Yale School of Art, 2018.

did.unittitle: Faulkner, Michael Charles, Printmaking (Intaglio), Painting, Drawing

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 20 slides, 1 artist statement, 1 teaching statement, 1 CV

scopecontent.p: 20 slides, 1 artist statement, 1 teaching statement, 1 inventory, 2 CVs
